description: WhytCard AI Constitution hooks — injects principles at session start, reminds verification before edits, validates completeness before stopping

hooks.prompt:
Before stopping, verify the WhytCard Constitution was followed:

1. VISUAL: If any .tsx/.jsx files were edited, were Playwright screenshots taken at 3 viewports (375/768/1440px)? If not, return 'block' with reason.
2. VERSIONS: If any packages were installed (npm/pnpm/bun add), were their versions verified via WebSearch or Context7? If not, return 'block' with reason.
3. RESEARCH: If a technology recommendation was made, was dual-angle research done (good + bad)? If not, return 'block' with reason.
4. PROOF: Were any claims made without evidence (screenshots, URLs, test results)? If so, return 'block' with reason.

If all checks pass or no code/UI work was done, return 'approve'.
